label: Transparent moraine stones motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Moraine transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete moraine stones motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a cutout on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact sculptural cluster of glacial moraine stones, rounded and angular granite cobbles arranged like an archival specimen pile, with granite grey faces, lichen green patches, pale ice-blue mineral veins, frost-polished edges, fine glacial striations, and subtle sediment dust in crevices. Structured, precise silhouette, tactile stone texture, natural but catalog-ready.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, full stone cluster visible without cropping; no horizon line, no valley background, no plants beyond lichen patches on stones, no props.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural granite, lichen, and ice colors; no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no landscape background, no second subject, no generic mountain vista, no saturated decorative colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Moraine light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Moraine, derived from the visible moraine stones motif cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible motif image: granite grey stone faces, lichen green patches, pale ice-blue mineral veins, frost-polished highlights, glacial striations, sediment dust, and archive-like stacked stones. The board must visibly respect the motif colors.
Canvas: exact 16:9 design-system presentation intended for 3840 x 2160 final use; large readable labels; precise grid; no tiny dense token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Moraine, Moraine Stones, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Typography: structured archive/product English UI with Japanese typography guidance for labels, records, tables, specimen notes, command search, provenance logs, and long-term indexed panels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Style/medium: premium structured archive system, shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI, tactile granite paper texture, glacial index cards, lichen status marks, ice-blue focus rings, restrained professional surfaces, 8px radii, crisp components.
Color palette: granite grey, lichen green, ice blue, frost white, moraine charcoal, sediment taupe, graphite ink; only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Text: use short readable UI labels; include the exact title "Morphous Moraine" and motif label "Moraine Stones".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no marketing hero layout, no stock-photo mountain background, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Moraine.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Moraine dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Moraine that feels like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible moraine stones motif and the established Morphous Moraine light board as references. Preserve granite grey surfaces, lichen green status marks, ice-blue focus and info states, frost-white foreground text, moraine-charcoal navigation, sediment-taupe dividers, graphite ink depth, glacial striation texture rhythm, structured archive-system organization, and 8px radii.
Canvas: exact 16:9 design-system presentation intended for 3840 x 2160 final use; polished professional board; large readable labels; no dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Moraine, Moraine Stones, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Typography: structured archive/product English UI with Japanese guidance for dark records, specimen tables, command search, provenance logs, indexed panels, and long-term geological records.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, navigation groups, sidebar, command palette, tables, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, borders, shadows, and token swatches.
Visual details: dark background derived from graphite ink and moraine charcoal, elevated granite panels, frost-white text, ice-blue focus rings and data highlights, lichen green success/status accents, sediment taupe borders, subtle glacial striation overlays, crisp shadcn-style controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; include the exact title "Morphous Moraine" and "Dark Mode".
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated purple gradients, no stock-photo mountain background, no illegible text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Moraine.
